mapper.select: SELECT SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state <> '' AND TO_DAYS(create_time) = TO_DAYS(NOW())),1,0)) todayIndent, SUM(if(pay_state = 1 AND user_b_id= #{userBId},price,0)) allEarnings, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state <> ''),1,0)) allIndentCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 1),1,0))newIntentCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 2),1,0)) inServiceCount, CONCAT(0) obligationCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 3),1,0)) toEvaluateCount, SUM(if((user_b_id = #{userBId} AND state = 4),1,0)) cancelledCount FROM app_rescue_indent
